prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别约2423名→2526名→2711名→1941名→1381名。2021–2023年位次逐年小幅后移约300名，但2024年大幅前移至1941名，2025年进一步                        前移至1381名，近两年累计前移约1330名，报考热度显著上升；2021–2023年招生计划稳定在83–84人，2024年大幅缩减至53人，2025年回升至57人；2026年计划增至65人，较2025年扩招约14%，扩招幅度较大，可能缓解部分竞争压力。

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等                        核心工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐；重庆市2026年普通高考总人数约209000人，物理类考生按近年约65%占比估算约13.6万人，考生规模基本稳定；东南大学位于江苏南京，非重庆本地高校；该校在全国招生中重庆占比约2.5%（2025年），属中等偏低水平，重庆考生报考省外985高校意愿较强。\                        n综合2024–2025年位次大幅前移的强劲趋势、2026年扩招14%的缓解效应、以及学校顶尖工科实力对考生的持续吸引力，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年1381                         名基础上因扩招而小幅后移至约1497名，区间1317–1677名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 2423 → 2526 → 2711 → 1941 → 1381. Rankings shifted slightly backward by about 300 positions each year from 2021 to 2023, but moved significantly forward to 1941 in 2024, and further forward to 1381 in 2025, with a cumulative forward shift of about 1330 positions in the last two years, indicating a notable increase in application popularity; enrollment plans were stable at 83–84 from 2021 to 2023, sharply reduced to 53 in 2024, and rebounded to 57 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 65, an expansion of about 14% compared to 2025, which may alleviate some competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southeast University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 15th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 13–17 range in recent years, making it a top domestic engineering powerhouse; no negative records for Southeast University in the 2026 reputation document; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 31st (relatively hot), with 17 videos mainly covering campus life and academic strength, overall exposure moderately high; recent reputation events are somewhat negative but mild, with limited impact on application psychology; has 18 A- or above disciplines, including 5 A+ disciplines: Architecture A+, Civil Engineering A+, Transportation Engineering A+, Biomedical Engineering A+, and Electronic Science and Technology A+, with extremely outstanding engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Chongqing Gaokao is approximately 209,000, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 136,000 based on the recent 65% proportion, with a basically stable candidate pool; Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local Chongqing university; the university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025), which is moderately low, and Chongqing candidates have a strong willingness to apply to 985 universities outside the province. Combined with the strong trend of significant forward ranking shifts in 2024–2025, the mitigating effect of a 14% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the sustained attraction of the university's top engineering strength to candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 1381 due to expansion, to approximately 1497, with a range of 1317–1677.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Wu Jianxiong Class)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, Cyberspace Security).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Marine Information Engineering)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1317–1677, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors such as Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering and Automation, with Tier 1 Engineering Experimental Class (Wu Jianxiong Class) and Computer Science as reach options, and Tier 3 Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems as safety choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<1317), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2024 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1108 → 1038, moving forward by about 70 places in recent years, indicating a slight increase in application popularity; in 2024, the plan was 23 students, reduced to 18 in 2025; the 2026 plan further decreases to 16 students, a reduction of about 11% compared to 2025, with a clear trend of enrollment contraction, potentially intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.text: Southeast University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 15th in the 2026 Soft Science Rankings, with top-tier comprehensive strength, also attractive to liberal arts candidates; no negative records for Southeast University in the 2026 reputation documents; Douyin popularity ranked 31st (relatively hot), with overall exposure moderately high; Law A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, etc., are related to liberal arts enrollment majors (Liberal Arts Experimental Class includes Accounting/Finance/Economics, etc., English), with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.text: The Finance/Economics/Economy majors covered by the Liberal Arts Experimental Class have mixed social popularity, English major popularity is average; in 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Chongqing is estimated at about 73,000 based on approximately 35% of recent years, with a basically stable candidate pool; Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local Chongqing university; Chongqing candidates have a strong willingness to apply to 985 universities outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight forward trend in rankings from 2024 to 2025, the intensified competition due to an 11% enrollment reduction in 2026, and the attractiveness of the top 985 brand to liberal arts candidates, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move forward from the 2025 ranking of 1038 to approximately 1038, with a range of 853–1085.
